Localization.Description: Execution of some SQL commands may indicate that information about the MySQL database users is retrieved, which may indicate attacker activity

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User "{subject.account.name}" retrieved the MySQL database user information using an SQL command on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" retrieved information about their account name in the MySQL database using an SQL command on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" retrieved the list of MySQL database roles and permissions using an SQL command on host {event_src.host}
